sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: 1 contract per $2,500 active equity. Optimal f = 0.1211. Position sizing formula: Contracts = Active Equity / 2,500. Includes FAHPR, FSD, and FGHPR calculations for geometric mean return under optimal f leverage.

source_rule_text: Trade 1 contract for every $2,500 in account equity, adjusting position size based on current active equity
